metadata.architecture_summary: Dense bidirectional GLM Transformer with autoregressive blank infilling, full-context MHA, GeGLU, RoPE, DeepNorm-based Post-LN, and tied input/output embeddings.

architecture.pretraining_objective: autoregressive blank infilling with MASK and gMASK plus multi-task instruction pre-training
architecture.generation_attention_mask: bidirectional prefix with causal generated span

metadata.parameter_count_convention: Counts matrix weights executed for one decode token. The shared 150528-row embedding matrix is counted once as the FP16 LM head, and input lookup is represented by one FP16 row read. Biases, LayerNorm parameters, vector-wise quantization scales, GeGLU/RoPE/softmax elementwise work, and logits materialization are excluded.

precision_profile.quantized_modules: All QKV, attention output, GeGLU input, and FFN output linear matrices.
precision_profile.unquantized_parameters: Input/output embedding, LayerNorm, and bias parameters remain FP16.
precision_profile.runtime_compute: Packed INT4 linear weights are dynamically converted to FP16 before matrix multiplication.

metadata.quantization_note: The engine models logical packed-INT4 HBM reads for quantized matrices and FP16 reads for the tied embedding/head. Vector-wise FP16 scales and the implementation-dependent physical traffic of runtime dequantization are not represented by schema_version 1 and remain outside this baseline.
metadata.context_note: 2048 is the official maximum sequence length and the gMASK generation context used by this release.
metadata.attention_note: GLM's bidirectional prefix mask changes visibility but not the full-prefix KV capacity or full-prefix scan used by Decode, so it maps to full-context MHA in the engine.

engine_scope.prefill_note: The current prefill engine assumes a causal triangular mask and cannot reproduce GLM blank-infilling, bidirectional-prefix, or span-permutation masks. Any mechanically generated prefill result for this config is outside the research boundary.

metadata.deployment_note: The official INT4 profile runs without weight offload on 4 x RTX 3090 24GB or 8 x RTX 2080 Ti 11GB. This project treats that node as one aggregate compute and memory domain.
